name: Rome — Brick by Brick
source: Song: Rome — patient rhythmic brick-by-brick spirit
essence: Empires are built one perfectly placed brick at a time; presence in every second until the last breath.

name: Gautam Buddha
source: Life and awakening of one who saw clearly while still human
essence: Middle Way, clear seeing, compassionate presence, lotus rising from mud untouched.

name: Phoenix Hammer
source: AFS forge archetype — unrestrained passion tempered by rhythm
essence: Strike with fire; rebuild from ash; headphones on, anvil steady.

name: Bodhi Tree
source: Sitting under one's own tree of awakening
essence: Any quiet moment becomes potential enlightenment — lamp unto yourself.

name: Limitless Adaptability
source: Seemingly vague inner quality — boundless morph
essence: Form shifts; essence holds. Morph without losing the lattice.
